all.en: Internal memorandum from the Marketing Department, dated March third
all.zh: 行銷部內部備忘錄，日期為三月三日

all.en: Subject: Annual Net Promoter Score results and recommended actions
all.zh: 主旨：年度淨推薦分數結果與建議行動方案

all.en: To: All employees, executive leadership, and regional directors
all.zh: 致：全體員工、高階領導層與區域總監

all.en: From: Helena Park, Vice President of Customer Marketing
all.zh: 由：客戶行銷副總 Helena Park

all.en: We are pleased to share the consolidated findings from our annual survey
all.zh: 很高興與大家分享年度調查的彙整結果

all.en: The survey ran from January eighth through February twentieth
all.zh: 調查期間自一月八日至二月二十日

all.en: A total of four thousand two hundred customers received the invitation
all.zh: 共有四千兩百位客戶收到調查邀請

all.en: Our response rate reached thirty-four percent, a five-point improvement
all.zh: 回覆率達百分之三十四，較去年提升五個百分點

all.en: Headline result: our overall NPS landed at plus forty-two
all.zh: 重點結果：整體 NPS 為正四十二分

all.en: This represents a seven-point increase compared to last year
all.zh: 較去年提升七個百分點

all.en: Promoter responses now account for fifty-eight percent of all replies
all.zh: 推薦者回覆現占所有回覆的百分之五十八

all.en: Passive responses sit at twenty-six percent, broadly steady year over year
all.zh: 中立者占百分之二十六，與去年持平

all.en: Detractors decreased to sixteen percent, down from twenty-one percent
all.zh: 批評者下降至百分之十六，去年為百分之二十一

all.en: Breaking down by segment, enterprise customers scored plus fifty-one
all.zh: 依客群拆解，企業客戶得分正五十一

all.en: Mid-market customers registered plus thirty-eight on the scale
all.zh: 中型市場客戶為正三十八

all.en: Small business customers came in at plus thirty-three, our weakest tier
all.zh: 小型企業客戶為正三十三，是表現最弱的層級

all.en: Geographic breakdown shows North America leading at plus forty-six
all.zh: 地理區域上北美領先，達正四十六

all.en: EMEA followed closely at plus forty-three points
all.zh: 歐非中東緊隨在後，達正四十三分

all.en: Asia Pacific scored plus thirty-seven, our highest growth opportunity
all.zh: 亞太區為正三十七，是我們最大成長機會

all.en: Latin America registered plus thirty-one, requiring focused attention
all.zh: 拉丁美洲為正三十一，需要聚焦關注

all.en: Top three drivers of promoter loyalty were identified in the open comments
all.zh: 推薦者忠誠度的前三大驅動因素已在開放問答中辨識

all.en: Product reliability received the highest praise across all segments
all.zh: 產品可靠性在所有客群中獲得最高讚譽

all.en: Account team responsiveness ranked second among repeat themes
all.zh: 客戶經理團隊回應速度在重複主題中排名第二

all.en: Onboarding experience was the third most-cited positive driver
all.zh: 導入體驗為第三大正面驅動因素

all.en: Detractor concerns clustered around three recurring pain points
all.zh: 批評者顧慮集中於三大重複痛點

all.en: First, billing complexity drew the largest share of negative comments
all.zh: 第一，帳單複雜度獲得最多負評

all.en: Customers cited confusing line items and inconsistent invoice formats
all.zh: 客戶提及項目混亂且發票格式不一致

all.en: Second, the self-service portal was described as outdated and slow
all.zh: 第二，自助服務入口被形容為過時且緩慢

all.en: Third, response times on tier-two support exceeded customer expectations
all.zh: 第三，二線支援回應時間超出客戶預期

all.en: In response, we are launching three concrete initiatives this quarter
all.zh: 對此，我們本季啟動三項具體行動方案

all.en: Initiative one is a billing transparency project led by finance operations
all.zh: 方案一為由財務營運主導的帳單透明化專案

all.en: A redesigned invoice template will roll out by April thirtieth
all.zh: 重新設計的發票範本將於四月三十日前上線

all.en: Initiative two is a complete overhaul of the customer portal
all.zh: 方案二為客戶入口的全面改版

all.en: User research begins next week with twenty customer participants
all.zh: 使用者研究下週展開，將有二十位客戶參與

all.en: Beta release is targeted for late June, full launch in September
all.zh: Beta 版預計六月下旬發布，九月全面上線

all.en: Initiative three expands tier-two support staffing by twelve headcount
all.zh: 方案三將二線支援人力擴編十二人

all.en: New hires will complete certification training before April fifteenth
all.zh: 新進員工將於四月十五日前完成認證訓練

all.en: Each initiative has a named executive sponsor and quarterly milestones
all.zh: 每項方案皆有指定的高階主管贊助人及季度里程碑

all.en: We will publish progress updates in the monthly company newsletter
all.zh: 進度更新將刊載於每月公司電子報

all.en: Beyond these initiatives, we are introducing closed-loop feedback
all.zh: 除這些方案外，我們將導入封閉式回饋循環

all.en: Every detractor will receive a personal call within seventy-two hours
all.zh: 每位批評者將於七十二小時內接到專人來電

all.en: Promoters will be invited to join our newly formed customer advisory board
all.zh: 推薦者將獲邀加入新成立的客戶顧問委員會

all.en: The advisory board meets quarterly with our chief product officer
all.zh: 顧問委員會將與產品長每季召開會議

all.en: We are also launching a referral program offering meaningful rewards
all.zh: 我們也推出提供具吸引力獎勵的推薦計畫

all.en: Promoters can earn account credits for successful introductions
all.zh: 推薦者可透過成功引介獲得帳戶抵用金

all.en: Details will be communicated through targeted email campaigns next month
all.zh: 細節將於下月透過精準電子郵件活動傳達

all.en: Internally, every team should review the segment-specific verbatims
all.zh: 對內，各團隊應檢視各客群的逐字回饋

all.en: Verbatim reports are available in the customer insights workspace
all.zh: 逐字回饋報告可於客戶洞察工作區取得

all.en: Department leads should integrate findings into Q2 planning sessions
all.zh: 部門主管應將發現納入 Q2 規劃會議

all.en: We are scheduling an all-hands town hall for March eighteenth
all.zh: 我們將於三月十八日召開全員市民大會

all.en: The CEO will share his perspective and field employee questions live
all.zh: 執行長將分享其觀點並現場回答員工提問

all.en: Thank you to everyone who supported survey outreach and analysis
all.zh: 感謝所有支援調查推廣與分析的同仁

all.en: Customer trust is earned daily through every interaction we deliver
all.zh: 客戶信任是透過我們每次互動逐日累積而來的

all.en: Let's collectively turn this momentum into lasting loyalty
all.zh: 讓我們共同將此動能轉化為持久忠誠

all.en: Warm regards, Helena Park and the customer marketing team
all.zh: 致上溫暖問候，Helena Park 與客戶行銷團隊
